title: No Sleep
description: A datapack to notify players when you tell them not to sleep.
body: # no-sleep **Warning:** This data pack is still in beta. It should be relatively stable, but there's still more features to add (including optionally forcing no sleep). Please report any bugs you find on [Codeberg](https://codeberg.org/osfanbuff63/no-sleep). ## About No Sleep is a Minecraft data pack that does just that - it lets you tell everyone on your server not to sleep when you ask them not to. ## Download ## Usage To trigger no sleeping, run `/trigger no_sleep`. Whenever someone then tries to sleep, they will get a notification that you requested to not sleep. Your request will be cleared after 1 Minecraft day (24000 ticks, ~20 minutes), and you'll have to trigger it again. ## License Licensed under the Apache License 2.0. For the full text, please visit [apache.org](https://apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0).
